lineup_source: United States vs. Australia, Group D, 19 June 2026 (4-4-2)

players.name: Matt Freese
players.note: Born in Wayne, Pennsylvania. Father Andrew Freese was a neurosurgeon born in the US; paternal grandparents Ernst and Elisabeth Freese were German scientists who immigrated to the US after WWII (grandparent-level, not parent). Mother Marcia Geary Wolicki is American.

players.name: Sergino Dest
players.note: Born in Almere, Netherlands. Father Kenneth Dest was born in Suriname and later immigrated to the United States; mother is Dutch.

players.name: Chris Richards
players.note: Born in Birmingham, Alabama. Father Ken Richards played college basketball at Birmingham-Southern College and later played professionally abroad (Australia, Bolivia, Iceland), but no documented non-US origin; assumed American. Mother Carrie Richards is American.

players.name: Tim Ream
players.note: Born in St. Louis, Missouri. No parental origin documented; assumed American (medium confidence).

players.name: Antonee Robinson
players.note: Born in Milton Keynes, England, raised in Liverpool. Father Marlon Robinson was born in England (with a Jamaican-origin mother — grandparent level, not counted); mother Kelly Robinson was also born and raised in England. Holds US nationality through father's naturalization.

players.name: Tyler Adams
players.note: Born in Wappingers Falls, New York. Mother Melissa Russo is American (European descent). Biological father's identity not publicly disclosed; described as African American but birthplace unknown — set to United States (low confidence).

players.name: Weston McKennie
players.note: Born at Fort Lewis, Washington. Father John McKennie Sr. is an African American US Air Force officer from the United States; mother Tina McKennie is an American from Texas. Grew up in Germany due to father's military posting.

players.name: Alex Freeman
players.note: Born in Plantation, Florida (some sources say Baltimore, MD). Father Antonio Freeman is an American former NFL wide receiver (born Baltimore, MD). Mother Rochelle's origin is not documented.

players.name: Malik Tillman
players.note: Born in Nuremberg, Germany. 'Tillman is a dual national of the United States and Germany due to his father being American and his mother German.' Represented the US after initially appearing for Germany youth teams.

players.name: Ricardo Pepi
players.note: Born in El Paso, Texas. Both parents Daniel and Annette Pepi immigrated to the United States from Ciudad Juárez, Mexico. Speaks Spanish at home and holds dual US-Mexican nationality.

players.name: Folarin Balogun
players.note: Born in Brooklyn, New York, to two Nigerian parents. Parents were living in London and visiting New York when his mother went into labor; she was unable to fly back due to pregnancy, so he was born in the US. Grew up in London.
